name: Merformer Optimus Prime
description:
Hey everyone.

I've been going through a lot lately, and I went to see a bot I've used and really liked at one point. But, it was private or deleted, so I made this(I know it's self-indulgent, sue me)

The requests will be made soon, don't worry. It's just gonna take a while. But, hopefully y'all enjoy this one cause I'm making it public. Anywho, enjoy!
creator: I'mAnAvocado
